title: ExtraStuck
body:
**[Minestuck](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/minestuck) is required for the mod to work.**

Although not required, [Patchouli](https://modrinth.com/mod/patchouli) is recommended to know how to get and use the different items.

Adds moduses, shields, weapons, tools, arrows, food, cosmetic armor, useful armor, and decorative blocks.

<details>
<summary>Moduses</summary>

## Pile Modus
Displays stored items in a square. Taking one will drop those above.

## Void Modus
Voids overflow. Attempting to take an item will void it from the inventory.

## Fortune Modus
Taking an item will store it in a fortune cookie.

## Ore Modus
Taking an item will store it in an ore.

## Archeology Modus
Taking an item will store it in suspicious sand or gravel.

## Ender Modus
Allows direct access to the player's ender chest.  
**Bugged**: items displayed may not be up to date if the ender chest was modified without using the modus. Just add/remove an item from the modus to update it.

## Mastermind Modus
Taking an item out will lock it behind a little puzzle. The difficulty can be changed using the Mastermind Codebreaker program.  
**Failing the puzzle will destroy the item.**

## Furnace Modus
Taking an item out will smelt it (if possible) at the cost of fuel. If the item cannot be smelted, the equivalent of 10 seconds of smelting will be used.

## Compact Modus
Stacks duplicates of items, hiding the other copies. Scroll to switch between them.

## Crafting Modus
Stores crafting recipes instead of items, each at the need of 10 cards.  
Recipes can only be used if the items with the same components are in the inventory.
</details>

<details>
<summary>Shields</summary>

## Wooden Shield
A cheap shield made of wood, it can be burnt to be turned into a Flame Shield. Can be repaired using planks.

## Flame Shield
Sets melee attackers on fire.

## Halt Shield
Has stronger knockback and turns melee attackers around.

## Light Shield
Sets melee attackers on fire for longer.

## Non-Contact Contract, Iron Shield, Gold Shield, Diamond Shield
A bunch of normal shields. Can be repaired using paper, iron ingots, gold ingots, and diamonds respectively.

## Gift of Protection
Has a chance to drop gifts when blocking damage.

## slied
A very bad shield.

## Riot Shield
A large shield. Can be repaired using iron ingots.

## Captain Justice's Throwable Shield
A shield that can be swapped into a throwable version.

## Capitashield
Consumes boondollar to prevent damage.

## Spikes on a Slab
Deals damage to melee attackers. Can be repaired using iron ingots.

## Jawbiter
Deals damage to melee attackers, underlings killed with it will also drop grist candy. Can be repaired using any grist candy.

## Eldritch Shield
Deals damage to melee attackers, blocking damage grants a short damage boost.

## Flux Shield
Consumes forge energy to prevent damage. Can be repaired using gold ingots.

## Netherite Shield
Grants knockback resistance when held. Can be repaired using netherite ingots.

## Garnet Shield
Grants attack speed when held.

## Pogo Shield
Bounces projectiles back. Can be repaired using iron ingots.

## Return to Sender
Bounces projectiles back the way the player is looking.

## Cast Gold Shield
Shoots a fireball forward on block. If Iron's Spells & Spellbooks is installed, it instead casts the currently selected spell.
</details>

<details>
<summary>Weapons</summary>

## Captain Justice's Shield Throwable
Can be thrown or turned back into a shield.

## Gem Breaker
A hammer with an additionnal level to fortune.

## Bell Hammer
A hammer that dings on hit.

## Blind Hammer
A sidegrade to the above with more damage and blinds enemies and users.

## Steam-Powered Warhammer
A simple hammer that consumes fuel to deal more damage and set enemies on fire.

## Gold Coin
A die with a chance to deal an extra damage.

## Sticky Die
A die that heavily slows enemies, with a chance to deal extra damage.

## Token Tetrahedron
A die that has a chance to drop a token that boosts luck, and may deal extra damage.

## D-Ice
A die that has a chance to drop an ice shard, and may deal extra damage.

## Slice and Dice
A dagger/die that has a chance to deal extra damage.

## D1
A really bad die that has a chance to drop itself.

## D10
A die that can stop enemies, with a chance to deal extra damage.

## Rainbow D7
A die that gives a random potion effect on hit (to both the attacker and target), with a chance to deal extra damage.

## D8 Night
A baton/die that gives darkness to enemies in the day and night vision to users in the night, with a chance to deal extra damage.

## Can-Die
A die that makes killed underlings drop grist candy, with a chance to deal extra damage.

## Jackpot
A die that rolls 3 symbols and gives an effect based on them. Sevens also give boondollars.

## Infini-Die
An unobtainable die that deals between 6 and the enemy's health as damage. It is also unbreakable.

## Silver Bat
A club that has an additionnal level to smite.

## Golden Pan
A rare club found in gifts.

## Rolling Pin
A club that can be used with any mod that needs a rolling pin.

## Destruction's Bat
A club that deals more damage to bigger enemies.

## Big Club
A large club with more range.

## Death Mace
Skull-themed mace.

## Withered Mace
An upgrade to the Death Mace that gives wither to enmies.

## D8th M8ce
A mace with a 25% chance to deal triple damage.

## Key of Trials
A simple key weapon.

## Key of Ominous Trials
A key that has an additionnal level to looting. Some players may also gain luck and apply unluck to enemies.

## Office Key
A key that can be swapped to a handgun. Deals more damage when loaded.

## Ancient Vault Opener
A normal key. With Iron's Spells & Spellbooks installed, it increases fire spell power.

## Vault Melter
A key that burns enemies. With Iron's Spells & Spellbooks installed, it increases fire spell power and resistance.

## Baguette Magique
A french wand made of bread.

## Money Magic
A wand that deals more damage the more boondollars you have. Enemies killed with it have a chance to drop boondollars.

## Cursed Cat Staff
A wand with a chance to apply poison to enemies around.

## Blessed Cat Staff
A normal wand.

## Branch of Yggdrasil
A legendary wand that has a chance to give levitation to enemies. With Iron's Spells & Spellbooks installed, it gives decent spell casting bonuses.

## Staff of Yggdrasil
Upgrade of the above, increases damage based on enemy debuffs. With Iron's Spells & Spellbooks installed, it additionnally gives 20% spell power for fire, ice, lightning, ender, blood and nature magic.

## Prospitian Wand
Can be used to shoot a fireball, or switch to a Cast Gold Shield while holding shift.

## Broom
A cane that can also brush blocks.

## Iron Crowbar
A cane that can be used to instantly break some blocks.

## Magnefork
A fork that attracts nearby items and grist.

## Overcharged Magnefork
An upgrade to the above with a higher range, but with FE consumption. Can be be turned off.

## Heartstabber
A fork that heals a heart on kill.

## YellowcakeSaw
An upgrade to the Cakesaw that deals more damage and applies Wither.

## The Sting
A baton that angers nearby bees on the enemy hit.

## Stocks Upticker, Pirate Hook, Debt Reaper, None of Your Business, Investlance, Cashgrabbers
A set of weapons that have a chance to drop boondollars when killing enemies.

## Blight
A sickle which poisons enemies.

## End of Civilization
A sickle which gives a spreading poison to enemies. The Cosmic Plague armor set is heavily recommended.

## Leafburner
A scythe that mines up to 50 leaves at once. Consumes fuel to deal more damage and burn enemies.

## Sun Reaver, New Moon
A sword and a sickle that boost each other's damage when held in both hands.

## Leader's Sword
A sword that heals nearby entities. If Iron's Spells & Spellbooks is installed, the Healing Circle spell will be used instead.

## Explosive Scoop
A spoon that explodes enemies on kill.

## Doorbuster
An axe that gives strength and haste when breaking doors.

## Handgun
Can be loaded with bullets and switched back to an Office Key.

## Radbow
A crossbow that can only be loaded with uranium rods. Each rod provides 10 shots which inflict Wither on enemies.

## Mechanical Radbow
An upgrade to the Radbow with more durability and enchantability. If Create is installed, backtank air will be drained instead of durability.

## Yin-Yang Orb
An upgrade to the Sorcerer's Pinball that deals more damage.

## Beenade
A grenade that needs to be loaded with a bee. When thrown, the nearest enemy will be the bee's target.

## LemonNade
An explosive lemon that can be thrown.

## BowwoB
A bow that shoots the same arrow twice. Only one can be picked up.

## Rainbow Bow
A bow that infuses a random effect in normal arrows. These cannot be picked up. All other arrows are unmodified.

## Make It Rain
Shoots a special arrow that drops 25 copies of the arrow used above whatever it hits.

## Shooting Star
Shoots arrows with twice the speed.

## bwo
Shoots arrows that are 25% their speed.

## SburbDB
Increases damage against underlings by 10% while held. Can be used on one to get its possible secondary drops.  
If Iron's Spells & Spellbooks is installed, it must be equipped for the bonus.

## Grimoire for Manipulating the Physically Dubious
*Only available with Iron's Spell & Spellbooks*  
A simple spell book that increases eldritch spell power.

## Gemini Spell Book
*Only available with Iron's Spell & Spellbooks*  
A pair of red and blue spell books that can be swapped with each other. Each color holds its own set of spells.

## Mage Guy
*Only available with Iron's Spell & Spellbooks*  
A simple basic spell book, with a little extra mana.

## Perfectly Unique Spell Book
*Only available with Iron's Spell & Spellbooks*  
Rarely found as a punched card in medium dungeons. Gains 10% spell power per empty slot, and starts with the Wololo spell inscribed.
</details>

<details>
<summary>Tools</summary>

## Old Brush
A brush with more durability.

## Magnet
Attracts nearby items and grist on use.

## Field Charger
Stores FE and can provide it to items in the inventory. Can also be used in a different item to charge it.

## Grist Detector
Displays the grist at the current location. Can switch grist layer by using it while crouching.

## Mastermind Codebreaker Disk
Adds the Mastermind Codebreaker program to computers, which makes finding Mastermind cards codes much more easily. It can also rewrite the card's code.

## Gold Digger
A large shovel that converts dug blocks into boondollars.

## Shinebreaker
A better pickaxe that converts mined blocks into boondollars. Has an extra level of Fortune.

## Anti Die
A strange-looking die with similar effects to Totems. Only heals up to 6 health.

## Two of Hearts
A card that heals 2 hearts on use.

## Two of Diamonds
A card that gives between 2 and 2000 boondollars on use.

## Two of Spades
A card that gives a pair of explosives on use.

## Two of Clubs
A card that can open any door, even redstone-locked doors.

## Solid Fishing Rod
A special fishing rod that can fish in any land fluids. Has a custom loot table for lands.
</details>

<details>
<summary>Arrows</summary>

## Nether Arrow
Deals additionnal damage to enemies on fire.

## Flame Arrow
Sets enemies and blocks on fire.

## Cardboard Arrow
A really cheap arrow.

## missed you
An arrow that cannot hit entities.

## Sweet Tooth
Underlings killed with this arrow will drop grist candy.

## Lightning Bolt
Summons thunder wherever it lands.

## Explosive Arrow
Explodes on hit. Does not destroy blocks.

## Iron Arrow
Deals additionnal damage.

## Quartz Arrow
Pierces through an enemy.

## Prismarine Arrow
Less affected by water slowdown.

## Glass Arrow
Deals a lot of additionnal damage but breaks on hit.

## Amethyst Arrow
Pierces through 2 enemies.

## Projecdrill
Breaks the first block it hits. Only applies to blocks mineable with iron tools.

## Crusader's Crossbolt
Heals allies.

## End Arrow
Deals additionnal damage to floating enemies.

## Telerrow
Teleports the shooter to wherever it lands.

## Dragon Arrow
Summons a cloud of dragon's breath wherever it lands.

## Punch Arrow
Deals extra knockback.

## Blank Arrow
Goes through blocks.
</details>

<details>
<summary>Food</summary>

## Pizza
Placeable, can be eaten in 4 bites. Each bite heals 2 hunger and 0.2 saturation.

## Pizza Slice
A slice of pizza that can be eaten for 2 hunger and 0.4 saturation.

## Fortune Cookie
Obtained from a Fortune Modus. Gives the item back on consumption.

## Sushroom Stew
A stew that can be eaten for 6 hunger and 6 saturation. Has a chance to apply regeneration and poison.

## Big Rad
A radioactive hamburger.

## Divine Temptation
A soup that is stored in a cauldron with 3 servings. Gives Strength when eaten.

## Slice of Yellowcake
A radioactive slice of cake.

## Cooked Bee Larva
Exactly what it sounds like. Do not eat near bees.

## Slices of Minestuck Cakes
Each cake in Minestuck can be cut with a cutting board, a knife, or a dagger. The slices have the same effects as their respective cakes. They can also be alchemized the same way, but with slices instead of cakes.

## Mortal Temptation
An upgrade to Divine Temptation. Gives Strength and Regeneration when eaten. Can be fed to consorts to improve the player's reputation.

## Bowl of Candy Crunch
Can be eaten for a strong speed boost with Slowness applied longer.

## Donut
Teleports the player to their spawn point when eaten.

## Sour Bomb Candy, Rocket Jump
Food and drink that explodes underfoot, launching the player upwards.

## Desert Juice
Can be drank for minor healing.

## Cosmic Sporeo
A sporeo with a chance to give levitation.

## Spam
Simple food that contains ads. The ads are just pieces of paper and can be used as such.

## Lemon Cake and Slice of Lemon Cake
Cake that explodes the eater.

## Gummy Ring
A piece of food that can be equipped as a ring to guarantee grist candy drops.
</details>

<details>
<summary>Armors</summary>

## Chef Hat & Apron
A purely cosmetic armor set for those who like to cook. Can be dyed.

## Propeller Hat
A hat with a propeller on top that halves the user's gravity.

## Heavy Boots
A pair of boots that double the user's gravity.

## Salesman Goggles, Saleswomen Glasses
Adds boondollar cost to items tooltips. Does nothing to items that do not have any.

## Dark Knight Armor
A direct upgrade to netherite armor.

## Cactus Armor
A direct upgrade to leather armor with an extra level of Thorns.

## Cosmic Plague Armor
Each piece has a 25% chance to block poison. The full set not only completely blocks poison, but has a 20% chance to block wither.

## Grist Viewers
Advanced version of the Grist Detector. Displays the grist straight in the GUI.
</details>

<details>
<summary>Machines</summary>

## Printer
Uses a carved dowel and uranium power to alchemize items from the owner's grist cache. Can be forced on with redstone.

## Disprinter
A sidegrade to the Printer which launches alchemized items forwards like a dropper. Only does so if the block in front is empty.

## Charger
Consumes uranium power to generate FE. Can charge and discharge items inside.

## Nuclear Reactor
Consumes water, or similar fluids, and energy cores to produce FE and uranium power.

## Uranium Blaster
Consumes uranium power to shoot a green beam that applies Wither to entities. Goes through transparent blocks.

## Dowel Drive and Card Cabinet
Store dowels and cards respectively. Both render their item's contents (when possible).
</details>

<details>
<summary>Decorative Blocks</summary>

## Garnet
A set of red blocks. Comes in bricks and chiseled bricks variants.

## Ruby
A set of bright red blocks. Comes in bricks and chiseled bricks variants.

## Cobalt
A set of blue blocks. Can be put in a stonecutter to produces bars, doors, trapdoors, and pressure plates.

## Sulfur
A set of dark yellow blocks that can hold fire forever.

## Marble
A set of yellow/pink blocks. Comes in polished, and bricks variants.

## Zillium
A set of tricolor bricks.
</details>

<details>
<summary>Misc</summary>

## Empty Energy Core
Given by Nuclear Reactors after draining an Energy Core. Can be crafted back into one with 4 Uranium Lumps.

## Boondollars for Idiots
Crafting item for weapons that drop boondollars.

## Bee Larva
A chicken egg for bees.

## Normal Cat Plush
A plush of a perfectly normal cat.

## Cosmic Plague Spore
An alchemy ingredient. Some dimensions activate it and will poison (or worse) the holder.
</details>

<details>
<summary>Additional integrations</summary>

## Ponder entries for Minestuck
All Minestuck machines have ponder entries. These can be disabled in the client config options. Only added when Ponder is installed.

## Grist Filter
A filter that checks grist values of items. Only functional when Create is loaded.

## Additionnal Cassettes
If Iron's Spells & Spellbooks is installed, additionnal cassettes with their own effects are also added.
</details>

## Modpack Usage
- Feel free to use this mod in any modpack you want
